Restaurants in Lake Nona

88%Grade A
4.3Avg rating
16Restaurants

Lake Nona is a dining district in Orange County, Central Florida. Explore its 16 restaurants below with health inspection grades, dietary options, and diner ratings — 14 currently hold an A health grade.
